General.Name: CIMG Inc.
General.Description: CIMG Inc. provides consumer food and beverage products. The company offers maca peptide coffee, noni, purified powder, and wine. The company sells its products to wholesale distributors, such as grocery stores, convenience stores, and vending machine operators. The company has a strategic partnership with iZUMi Finance for the development of digital asset infrastructure and on-chain liquidity services. The company was formerly known as NuZee, Inc. and changed its name to CIMG Inc. in October 2024. CIMG Inc. was founded in 2011 and is based in Tuen Mun, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Kin Ga Industrial Building, Tuen Mun, Hong Kong
